title: Avalore (Modpack)
description: A modpack for the Avalore server.
body:
**The official modpack for the **[Avalore](https://modrinth.com/server/avalore)** roleplay server!** This contains everything you'll need to get the best experience, including:

- Hand-tuned optimization mods
- General utility mods for managing inventories and chatting - including full chatlog saving, searching and exporting!
- Figura - many players use avatars extensively!
- The Conquest_ resource pack, which the builds are designed around
- Built-in shaders (Complementary Unbound)
- Custom keybinds for server commands and other server-specific tweaks
- And more!
